name: Victoria Sterling
title: Senior Luxury Specialist
bio: Victoria is one of New York's most sought-after luxury real estate specialists with over $125M in career sales. Her clientele includes Fortune 500 executives, international investors, and celebrity buyers.

name: Marcus Chen
title: Waterfront Property Expert
bio: Marcus is a legendary waterfront property specialist with expertise spanning both coasts. His deep knowledge of coastal regulations, climate considerations, and luxury amenities makes him the go-to agent for beach and harbor properties.

name: Sarah Williams
title: Urban Living Specialist
bio: Sarah specializes in helping tech professionals and young families find their perfect urban home. Her deep understanding of neighborhood dynamics, school districts, and commute patterns sets her apart.

name: James Rodriguez
title: Estate & Ranch Specialist
bio: With nearly two decades of experience in mountain and estate properties, James brings unparalleled expertise in luxury retreats, historic restorations, and ranch acquisitions across the Mountain West region.

name: Elena Vasquez
title: Commercial & Mixed-Use Expert
bio: Elena bridges the gap between residential luxury and commercial development. Her background in architecture and urban planning gives clients a unique perspective on property potential and investment value.
